title: Yellamma Temple, Saundatti
tagline: Yellamma Temple, Saundatti — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Yellamma Temple, also known as Renuka Temple (Kannada: ರೇಣುಕಾ ಯಲ್ಲಮ್ಮ ದೇವಿ ದೇವಸ್ಥಾನ), is a temple of Goddess (Devi) Renuka and a pilgrimage destination located about 5 kilometres (
overview.description: Yellamma Temple, also known as Renuka Temple (Kannada: ರೇಣುಕಾ ಯಲ್ಲಮ್ಮ ದೇವಿ ದೇವಸ್ಥಾನ), is a temple of Goddess (Devi) Renuka and a pilgrimage destination located about 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) away from the town of Saundatti in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is situated on a hilltop known earlier as Siddhachal Parvat and now known as "Yellammanna Gudda", named after the temple. The deity in the temple is the goddess Yellamma or Ellama or Renuka, revered as a fertility goddess. faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yellamma Temple, Saundatti?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yellamma Temple, Saundatti is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yellamma Temple, Saundatti?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Hubli Airport (44 km) and the nearest railway station is Hubballi Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yellamma Temple, Saundatti?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yellamma Temple, Saundatti at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yellamma Temple, Saundatti?
faq.a: Stays in Yellamma Temple, Saundatti start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Yellamma Temple, Saundatti?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramanagar, Belagavi, Yadravi, Dugabal, Yaragatti, Sattigeri.
